requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）

summary.en: Household refrigerators marketed in Uzbekistan predominantly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP about 3), a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant. Uzbekistan regulates the safety of flammable-refrigerant appliances primarily through the O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, whose Annex AA sets requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (maximum R-600a charge per appliance and room-volume configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source provisions); R-600a is classified A3 (lower flammability) under ISO 817. Manufacturers must: (1) verify that the refrigerant charge complies with the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability limits as adopted nationally; (2) declare the refrigerant type (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation; (3) confirm any phase-down or import-control obligations applicable to fluorinated/HFC refrigerants under Uzbekistan's environmental commitments. Uzbekistan is a party to the Montreal Protocol (including its phase-down framework for controlled substances), so ozone-depleting and HFC import controls are administered nationally; R-600a, as a hydrocarbon, is not an HFC and is not subject to HFC phase-down quotas.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦销售的家用电冰箱主要使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种低GWP碳氢化合物制冷剂。乌兹别克斯坦主要通过O'zDSt采用的IEC 60335-2-24对可燃制冷剂器具的安全进行管理，其附件AA规定了使用可燃制冷剂器具的要求（按器具及房间容积配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风及点火源规定）；R-600a依据ISO 817归类为A3（较低可燃性）。制造商须：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合国家采用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）确认乌兹别克斯坦环境承诺下适用于含氟/氢氟烃制冷剂的任何削减或进口管控义务。乌兹别克斯坦是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方（含其受控物质削减框架），故消耗臭氧层物质及氢氟烃进口管控由国家管理；R-600a作为碳氢化合物并非氢氟烃，不受氢氟烃削减配额约束。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克銷售的家用電冰箱主要使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種低GWP碳氫化合物製冷劑。烏茲別克主要通過O'zDSt採用的IEC 60335-2-24對可燃製冷劑器具的安全進行管理，其附件AA規定了使用可燃製冷劑器具的要求（按器具及房間容積配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風及點火源規定）；R-600a依據ISO 817歸類為A3（較低可燃性）。製造商須：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合國家採用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）確認烏茲別克環境承諾下適用於含氟/氫氟碳化物製冷劑的任何削減或進口管控義務。烏茲別克是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方（含其受控物質削減框架），故消耗臭氧層物質及氫氟碳化物進口管控由國家管理；R-600a作為碳氫化合物並非氫氟碳化物，不受氫氟碳化物削減配額約束。

standards_or_laws: O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, Annex AA — Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol (and its phase-down framework) — Uzbekistan national implementation of ozone-depleting-substance and HFC import controls

summary.en: In China, flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances is addressed within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements). Refrigerant designation and safety classification follow ISO 817 conventions, and GB 9237 (aligned with ISO 5149) covers general refrigeration-system safety. China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both China and Uzbekistan base their household-appliance flammable-refrigerant requirements on IEC 60335-2-24 and both control HFCs under the Montreal Protocol framework, Chinese R-600a refrigerators are technically well-positioned for the Uzbek market on the refrigerant dimension.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全纳入GB 4706.13-2014处理，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风、点火源要求）。制冷剂名称与安全分类遵循ISO 817惯例，GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）涵盖制冷系统总体安全。中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书·基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行氢氟烃削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国与乌兹别克斯坦的家用器具可燃制冷剂要求均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，且双方均在《蒙特利尔议定书》框架下管控氢氟烃，中国R-600a电冰箱在制冷剂维度上对乌方市场具备良好的技术条件。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全納入GB 4706.13-2014處理，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風、點火源要求）。製冷劑名稱與安全分類遵循ISO 817慣例，GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）涵蓋製冷系統總體安全。中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書·基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行氫氟碳化物削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國與烏茲別克的家用器具可燃製冷劑要求均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，且雙方均在《蒙特利爾議定書》框架下管控氫氟碳化物，中國R-600a電冰箱在製冷劑維度上對烏方市場具備良好的技術條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentary and verification-oriented rather than a fundamental technology gap, since both regimes share the IEC 60335-2-24 basis: (1) Product documentation submitted with the Uzbek certificate/declaration must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA. (2) The exact R-600a charge must be verified against the Annex AA maximum limits as adopted nationally; if Chinese CCC testing used a slightly different configuration, charge-limit compliance should be re-confirmed. (3) HFC/refrigerant import controls — any models still using R-134a or another HFC should be checked against Uzbekistan's national HFC import-control and phase-down measures before shipment. [NOTE: The exact Uzbek national HFC import-control timelines and any quota/licensing requirements should be confirmed against Lex.uz and the national ozone/HFC authority before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，由于两套制度均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，差距在于文件与核实，而非根本性技术差距：（1）随乌方证书/声明提交的产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项。（2）须按国家采用的附件AA最大限值核实R-600a充注量；若中国CCC检测采用略有不同的配置，应重新确认充注量限值的符合性。（3）氢氟烃/制冷剂进口管控——任何仍使用R-134a或其他氢氟烃的型号在发货前应对照乌兹别克斯坦国家氢氟烃进口管控及削减措施进行核查。【注：乌方国家氢氟烃进口管控的具体时间表及任何配额/许可要求，应在监管提交前对照Lex.uz及国家臭氧/氢氟烃主管机构确认。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，由於兩套制度均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，差距在於文件與核實，而非根本性技術差距：（1）隨烏方證書/聲明提交的產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項。（2）須按國家採用的附件AA最大限值核實R-600a充注量；若中國CCC檢測採用略有不同的配置，應重新確認充注量限值的符合性。（3）氫氟碳化物/製冷劑進口管控——任何仍使用R-134a或其他氫氟碳化物的型號在發貨前應對照烏茲別克國家氫氟碳化物進口管控及削減措施進行核查。【注：烏方國家氫氟碳化物進口管控的具體時間表及任何配額/許可要求，應在監管提交前對照Lex.uz及國家臭氧/氫氟碳化物主管機構確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via the O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA adoption (R-600a charge limits, ventilation); HFC import controls administered nationally under Uzbekistan's Montreal Protocol implementation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits derived from IEC 60335-2-24); China HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant for Uzbek-market household refrigerators and, as a hydrocarbon, is outside HFC phase-down quotas. Manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against the nationally adopted IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits and document refrigerant type and charge weight. Any HFC-based models should be checked against Uzbekistan's national HFC import-control measures before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是乌兹别克斯坦市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，作为碳氢化合物不受氢氟烃削减配额约束。制造商须按国家采用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值核实R-600a充注量，并记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含氢氟烃的型号在发货前应对照乌兹别克斯坦国家氢氟烃进口管控措施核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是烏茲別克市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，作為碳氫化合物不受氫氟碳化物削減配額約束。製造商須按國家採用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值核實R-600a充注量，並記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含氫氟碳化物的型號在發貨前應對照烏茲別克國家氫氟碳化物進口管控措施核查。
